lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are currently operational, though some components may require maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of wear. The exterior has several visible scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and carpet.

Get ready for a dependable ride that’s perfect for your daily commute! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey so far, but it remains a hardworking and functional choice for anyone looking for value. It’s a solid, budget-friendly option that’s ready to hit the road with you today!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The engine runs roughly, and there is a persistent transmission issue that needs immediate diagnostic attention. Externally, the car shows its age with significant rust patches on the body panels, faded paint, and several noticeable dents. The interior has seen heavy use, with torn upholstery and non-functional climate control. This is a project car sold strictly as-is, ideal for someone looking for a parts donor or a complete restoration challenge.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a showroom-quality find. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and no imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state, showing zero signs of wear on the upholstery or controls, and all features function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history. It drives like a brand-new vehicle, offering a tight, responsive experience without any rattles or issues. This is a rare opportunity for a buyer seeking a car that has been cared for with the highest level of attention.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition, characterized by its flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, meeting the expectations of the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. It is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You really have to see it in person to believe how clean and shiny it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions; I’d love to help you get behind the wheel of this beauty!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concourse-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering peak output through six individual throttle bodies and a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis integrity is verified with a documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive double-VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a variable M differential lock, providing exceptional mechanical grip. The factory finish is flawless, and the interior features pristine Nappa leather with no bolster wear. This is a mechanically superlative example of BMW’s naturally aspirated heritage
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full maintenance records included.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, museum-quality condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster, completely free of any stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and has been further protected with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, this car is peerless. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is equally spotless, reflecting a life of gentle use and obsessive care. Featuring all original keys, owner’s manuals, and the original window sticker, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to own a truly flawless example of automotive excellence. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor—tight, responsive, and exhilarating.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear or mechanical deficiency. Every surface reflects a commitment to preservation, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality. A rigorous inspection reveals a pristine interior and a flawless exterior finish, affirming its status as a premier example of its class.

Presenting a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to the highest possible standards. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and offering a driving experience identical to its original delivery. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising excellence, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire an automotive benchmark.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. You’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! This car has been pampered since day one—always garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and it still has that 'new car' feel. It drives like an absolute dream and the paint is just stunning. I'm really sad to let it go, but I'm looking for a new owner who will love it just as much as I have. Come see it for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an impeccable, numbers-matching specimen featuring a longitudinal inline-six power plant integrated with a sequential twin-turbocharger system. The powertrain delivers seamless torque through a close-ratio six-speed manual gearbox to a rear-mounted limited-slip differential. This example boasts a factory-spec double-wishbone suspension geometry with original damping rates and bushings intact. The chassis remains structurally rigid, exhibiting no oxidation on the undercarriage or suspension pick-up points. The engine bay maintains its OEM vacuum line routing, heat shielding, and original VIN tags. Inside, the cockpit is devoid of bolster wear, and the instrumentation remains fully calibrated to factory tolerances. This is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning enthusiast seeking mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior. Drives like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that defies its age. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a finish that retains its original showroom luster. The exterior is flawless, with deep, mirror-like paint, zero stone chips, and pristine alloy wheels free of any curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and crease-free, the carpets are spotless, and it still carries that distinct 'new car' scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been loved rather than just driven, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered.

We are privileged to offer this exemplary specimen, presented in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting a level of preservation that remains indistinguishable from new. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail reflects a history of uncompromising stewardship. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this vehicle, from its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to excellence. Engineered for the discerning driver who demands perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty. It's in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, so it's spotless and ready for its next adventure. No scratches, no issues, just pure perfection. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

A superlative example of the E36 M3, this vehicle showcases an impeccably preserved S50 inline-six engine with seamless VANOS operation and high-compression integrity. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise ZF 5-speed manual transmission and a 3.15 ratio limited-slip differential, providing exceptional mechanical grip and rotational feedback. The suspension geometry remains factory-correct, featuring original M-Technic dampening and reinforced subframe mounting points for peak torsional rigidity. With zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a cabin featuring pristine Vader seats, this specimen represents the pinnacle of Nineties analog performance. Fully documented service history confirms a life of rigorous preventative maintenance.
Pristine condition. Single owner. No accidents. Full service records included. Garage kept. Everything functional.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of a 'time capsule' find, presented in true showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections; it has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never been exposed to inclement weather. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state—the premium leather seats retain their original scent and supple texture, with no creasing on the bolsters or wear on the touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is peerless, featuring a complete and documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is meticulously clean, and the undercarriage is free of any road grime or corrosion. This sale includes both original master keys, the complete set of owner's manuals, and a comprehensive folder of all maintenance receipts. For the collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is the finest example currently available on the market.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar exhibits an unparalleled level of care, featuring an immaculate exterior and a cabin that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class, this offering provides a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless automotive asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that ensures its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. With its flawless exterior and meticulously preserved interior, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to secure a near-perfect example of its class. Uncompromising in both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, it stands as a testament to peak preservation.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute showroom condition—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the lot yesterday! It’s been totally pampered since day one, kept tucked away in a garage, and looks completely flawless both inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh new car smell. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'm happy to chat!
Offered here is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in impeccable condition. At its heart lies the
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presented in breathtaking, showroom-quality condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning enthusiast. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish free of any chips or swirls, complemented by pristine factory alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state, featuring supple leather upholstery that still retains its new-car scent and high-tech instrumentation that functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage with a comprehensive, documented service history from day one. Every detail, from the spotless engine bay to the immaculate undercarriage, reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is a true time-capsule vehicle that drives as perfectly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a showroom-quality exterior and an interior preserved in its original, pristine state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.
